project.name: Overnight Map
project.description: A real-time financial data visualization tool that displays S&P 500 and NASDAQ-100 stock market heat maps with 24/5 trading data. Unlike traditional market maps that only show regular trading hours, Overnight Map includes extended hours and overnight trading data from Robinhood, providing a comprehensive view of market movements.
features: Real-time heat map visualization of S&P 500 and NASDAQ-100 stocks
24/5 trading data including extended hours and overnight sessions
List view with detailed metrics for each stock
Automatic data refresh every 14 minutes during market hours
Weekend-aware refresh logic (skips updates when markets are closed)
Visitor tracking and analytics with IP geolocation
Performance-optimized with async data fetching and local caching
Color-coded performance indicators by percentage change
technical_highlights: Asynchronous data fetching with configurable concurrency limits (30 concurrent requests)
Exponential backoff retry logic for failed API requests
Time-zone aware scheduling (Eastern Time) for market hours detection
Client-side rendering optimization for tab switching
Efficient data aggregation from multiple API endpoints per stock (instrument ID, fundamentals, live quotes)
Custom treemap algorithm with hierarchical grouping by sector and sub-sector
Session management and visitor tracking with logging
challenges_solved: Efficiently fetching real-time data for 600+ stocks without rate limiting
Handling extended hours and overnight trading data
Optimizing page load times with async operations and caching
Creating responsive visualizations that work on mobile devices
Managing state across multiple user sessions
Implementing weekend-aware refresh logic to avoid unnecessary API calls
future_enhancements: Database integration for tracking unique visits over time
Systemd service for auto-start on boot and crash recovery
Historical data views and trend analysis
project.inspiration: Inspired by Finviz market maps but enhanced with 24/5 trading data
